queries.name: query_b
queries.query: is:pr is:merged language:Python ("drop python 2" OR "remove python 2" OR "port to python 3" OR "migrate to python 3" OR "python 3 compatibility")

queries.name: query_c
queries.query: is:pr is:merged language:Python (2to3 OR futurize OR xrange OR iteritems OR raw_input OR basestring)

queries.name: query_d
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("c++ to python" OR "from c++ to python" OR "replace c++ with python" OR "rewrite c++ in python")

queries.name: query_e
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("rewrite in python" OR "port to python" OR "convert to python") (c++ OR cpp OR "c extension"))

queries.name: query_f
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("remove c++" OR "remove cpp" OR swig OR ctypes OR "python rewrite")

queries.name: query_g
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("java to python" OR "from java to python" OR "replace java with python")

queries.name: query_h
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("rewrite in python" OR "port to python" OR "convert to python") java)

queries.name: query_j
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("python to c++" OR "from python to c++" OR "replace python with c++")

queries.name: query_k
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("rewrite in c++" OR "port to c++" OR "convert to c++") python)

queries.name: query_l
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("move hot path to c++" OR "rewrite core in c++") python)

queries.name: query_m
queries.query: is:pr is:merged ("python to java" OR "from python to java" OR "replace python with java")

queries.name: query_n
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("rewrite in java" OR "port to java" OR "convert to java") python)

queries.name: query_o
queries.query: is:pr is:merged (("java rewrite" OR "rewrite in java") python)
